nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql: SELECT DISTINCT fc.name AS evaluator_name, fc.employee_erp_id FROM answer_key_preparer ap JOIN answer_key ak ON ap.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN board b ON ak.qp_id = b.qp_id JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id WHERE fc.id = ap.faculty_cache_id AND fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id
